query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `generatedMaps` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `requestId` int NOT NULL, `userId` int NOT NULL, `datasetId` int NOT NULL, `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL, `mapType` varchar(64) NOT NULL, `thumbnailKey` varchar(512), `thumbnailUrl` text, `pngKey` varchar(512), `pngUrl` text, `pdfKey` varchar(512), `pdfUrl` text, `geojsonKey` varchar(512), `geojsonUrl` text, `mapConfig` json, `legendData` json, `stats` json, `width` int DEFAULT 1200, `height` int DEFAULT 800, `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), CONSTRAINT `generatedMaps_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)); CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `mapRequests` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `userId` int NOT NULL, `datasetId` int NOT NULL, `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL, `mapType` enum('choropleth','heatmap','proportional_symbol') NOT NULL, `attributeField` varchar(128), `classificationMethod` enum('equal_interval','quantile','natural_breaks','standard_deviation') DEFAULT 'quantile', `numClasses` int DEFAULT 5, `colorScheme` varchar(64) DEFAULT 'YlOrRd', `colorReverse` boolean DEFAULT false, `opacity` float DEFAULT 0.8, `strokeColor` varchar(32) DEFAULT '#ffffff', `strokeWidth` float DEFAULT 0.5, `showLegend` boolean DEFAULT true, `showLabels` boolean DEFAULT false, `labelField` varchar(128), `customOptions` json, `status` enum('pending','processing','completed','failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending', `errorMessage` text, `priority` int DEFAULT 0, `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT `mapRequests_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`))
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4XPMcD5JEiKVJMN.08c3659c27b7 --database gSxYvBjvBuVxgFq2rkQiib --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `generatedMaps` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `requestId` int NOT NULL, `userId` int NOT NULL, `datasetId` int NOT NULL, `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL, `mapType` varchar(64) NOT NULL, `thumbnailKey` varchar(512), `thumbnailUrl` text, `pngKey` varchar(512), `pngUrl` text, `pdfKey` varchar(512), `pdfUrl` text, `geojsonKey` varchar(512), `geojsonUrl` text, `mapConfig` json, `legendData` json, `stats` json, `width` int DEFAULT 1200, `height` int DEFAULT 800, `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), CONSTRAINT `generatedMaps_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)); CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `mapRequests` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `userId` int NOT NULL, `datasetId` int NOT NULL, `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL, `mapType` enum('choropleth','heatmap','proportional_symbol') NOT NULL, `attributeField` varchar(128), `classificationMethod` enum('equal_interval','quantile','natural_breaks','standard_deviation') DEFAULT 'quantile', `numClasses` int DEFAULT 5, `colorScheme` varchar(64) DEFAULT 'YlOrRd', `colorReverse` boolean DEFAULT false, `opacity` float DEFAULT 0.8, `strokeColor` varchar(32) DEFAULT '#ffffff', `strokeWidth` float DEFAULT 0.5, `showLegend` boolean DEFAULT true, `showLabels` boolean DEFAULT false, `labelField` varchar(128), `customOptions` json, `status` enum('pending','processing','completed','failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending', `errorMessage` text, `priority` int DEFAULT 0, `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT `mapRequests_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`))
